name: Spotify Connect
description: Control Spotify playback and display album art on your dashboard

clientId.title: Client ID
clientId.description: Spotify Developer App client ID (create one at developer.spotify.com)

connect.title: Connect to Spotify
connect.description: Authorize BRIKA to access your Spotify account

developer.title: Spotify Developer Portal
developer.description: Create and manage your Spotify app credentials

defaultDevice.title: Default Device
defaultDevice.description: Select the device to auto-start playback on

player.name: Spotify Player
player.description: Control Spotify playback and display album art

device.label: Device
device.description: Override the default device for this brick

play-song.name: Play a Song
play-song.description: Search Spotify and play any track with one tap

device.label: Device
device.description: Device to play searched songs on

now-playing.name: Now Playing
now-playing.description: Compact current-track widget (album art, title, artist)

player.title: Spotify
player.noDevices: No active devices found. Open Spotify on a device, then refresh.

play.name: Play Spotify
play.description: Start playback on a Spotify device

track-changed.name: Track Changed
track-changed.description: Emitted when the playing track changes

playback-paused.name: Playback Paused
playback-paused.description: Emitted when playback pauses or stops

volume-changed.name: Volume Changed
volume-changed.description: Emitted when the active device volume changes

device-changed.name: Device Changed
device-changed.description: Emitted when playback moves to a different device

get-now-playing.name: Now Playing
get-now-playing.description: Get the track currently or most recently playing on Spotify

search-tracks.name: Search Tracks
search-tracks.description: Search the Spotify catalog for tracks by title, artist, or album

play-track.name: Play Track
play-track.description: Start playback of a specific track, optionally on a chosen device

control-playback.name: Control Playback
control-playback.description: Play, pause, skip, seek, or set the playback volume

list-devices.name: List Devices
list-devices.description: List the available Spotify Connect devices
